title: Typhon
description: a Volcano Simulator "Paper Plugin" for Minecraft
body:
# Typhon - Realistic Volcano Simulator for Minecraft

![image](https://github.com/Alex4386/Typhon/assets/27724108/eae84dc2-5b9b-410a-9add-0157ecaa042d)
**Bring the awe-inspiring power and beauty (and horror) of real-world volcanoes into your Minecraft world!**

Typhon is a server-side plugin that faithfully recreates geological volcanic processes within vanilla Minecraft—no mods or texture packs required. Unlike other volcanic plugins, Typhon closely mimics real-world volcanoes, implementing approximations of actual geological phenomena to create a truly immersive experience, faithfully implemented in Vanilla Minecraft (e.g. `BlockDisplay`, `FallingBlock`, etc.).

## What Can Typhon Do?

### Eruption Features
- **Multiple Eruption Styles**: From gentle effusive lava flows to violent explosive eruptions
- **Various Vent Types**: Crater eruptions, fissure systems, summit vents, flank vents, and parasitic cones
- **Volcanic Bombs**: Large chunks of cooling lava ejected into the air
- **Pyroclastic Flows**: Deadly fast-moving currents of hot gas and pyroclasts
- **Ash Plumes**: Towering ash columns that can reach the stratosphere, darkening the sky

### Volcanic Environment
- **Lava Dynamics**: Realistic lava composition based on silica content and gas content
- **Pillow Lava**: Distinctive pillow-shaped structures form when lava meets water
- **Fumaroles**: Steaming vents that release volcanic gases
- **Volcanic Gas**: Dangerous emissions affecting plants, animals, and equipment
- **Caldera Formation**: Volcanoes collapse into their empty magma chambers
- **Lateral Blasts**: Sideways explosions similar to real volcanic events
 
### Geological Processes
- **Ore Formations**: Volcanic processes concentrate valuable minerals in newly formed rock
- **Geothermal Activity**: Heat-based mechanics that affect the surrounding landscape
- **Ecological Succession**: Watch life gradually return to devastated volcanic landscapes
- **Volcano Building**: Gradual construction of volcanic mountains through eruptions

## Key Features
- Fully configurable volcanic behavior and parameters
- Advanced visual effects using BlockDisplay and FallingBlocks
- Multiple interconnected vents and complex volcanic systems
- Realistic lava cooling and solidification mechanics
- Destructive gameplay—volcanoes WILL reshape your world
- Compatible with Spigot/Paper servers
- Designed for Minecraft 1.21+ with Java 21+

## Important Notes
**⚠️ Typhon is destructive!** Volcanoes can and will destroy builds, landscapes, and terrain. Make regular backups. The plugin is actively developed with new features and improvements regularly added.
